items.title: Wrote about how this LeBron charade is getting old. The teams are what they are. If he wants to contend, there's one team that has fewer flaws than the others.
items.author: Austin Krell
items.body_excerpt:
Wrote about how this LeBron charade is getting old. The teams are what they are. If he wants to contend, there's one team that has fewer flaws than the others.

Plus, a little bit on the idea of trading Embiid to get James' buddy Anthony Davis (🤮):

www.si.com/nba/76ers/on...

media.title: This LeBron Thing Is Getting Old
media.description: There's not much left to contemplate.

items.title: Restricted free agent Moussa Cisse has agreed to a two-year contract offer sheet with the New York Knicks, sources tell ESPN. His salary is half guaranteed in the first year and 2027-28 is non-guaranteed. The Dallas Mavericks have 48 hours to match or not.
items.author: Shams Charania Tweets
items.body_excerpt: Restricted free agent Moussa Cisse has agreed to a two-year contract offer sheet with the New York Knicks, sources tell ESPN. His salary is half guaranteed in the first year and 2027-28 is non-guaranteed. The Dallas Mavericks have 48 hours to match or not.
